description: Brand contract for the Apollo tiered-bundle starter-template family.

family_inventory.theme_insertion_point: Load brand-theme.css from frontmatter styles after css/next-core.css on checkout, upsell, downsell, and receipt pages.
family_inventory.pricing_presentation: Apollo bundle cards support compare/current, coupon-discounted savings, unit-plus-total, and full-price modes through SDK display nodes.
family_inventory.bundle_picker: Tiered bundle selector with data-next-bundle-selector/data-next-bundle-card anchors and bundle-card product/classic/tile style dispatch.
family_inventory.order_bump: Selector-area bump-check03 and form-section bump-check01/bump-switch01 variants are valid only when prepurchase packages exist.
family_inventory.upsell_downsell: Bundle stepper, tier-pills, and tier-cards upsells require a visible price row above the accept CTA.

exit_pop.behavior: Available include only; strip unless CampaignSpec checkout exit_intent or promo_code_input maps an offer/code.
